info.description: Top-level /experiences page (the index that lists Retreats / Workshops / Corporate / Speaking).

kicker.description: Small uppercase label that sits ABOVE the main heading. Keep it short — 1 to 3 words. Examples: 'For founders', 'A note from Anna', 'New series'.

kicker_colour.description: Hex colour for the kicker / accent. Format: #6E3A5A (the # then 6 letters/numbers). Anna's brand palette: Plum #6E3A5A, Terracotta #C4704A, Honey #FFD07A, Pink #F280AA, Sage #5DCAA5.

intro.default: Group sessions held on the houseboat at Taggs Island, online, and in corporate spaces. A few times a year, a small group comes to the island for a full reset day. Water outside, no agenda, just space to come back to yourself.
intro.description: One short paragraph that sits under the main heading. 2-3 sentences max. Tells the reader what this page or item IS in their language, not yours.

categories.description: Cards shown on the landing page. Each one links into a sub-page. Reorder or add new ones here.

seo_title.description: Optional SEO title override (60 chars max). Leave blank to use the page/item name. Shown in Google search results and browser tabs.

seo_description.description: Short summary for Google and ChatGPT (1-2 sentences, ~155 chars). Write what someone searching for this would actually type. Fills in automatically when you Save — leave blank unless you want to override
